headline: Yale University Develops SystemsAge, a Novel Blood Test for Multi-Organ Biological Aging Assessment
reason: This development represents a significant stride in human-centric longevity research, offering a novel blood test that can assess the biological age of 11 different organ systems from a single DNA methylation assay. This advancement paves the way for more personalized and preventive medicine, enabling targeted interventions based on which organs are aging fastest.
